   Advice Surgeries

I hold regular surgeries across the constituency throughout the year but you don't need to attend a surgery to discuss a case of raise an issue. You can contact me and my team at any time.
Upcoming Surgeries
Location
Date
Mumbles
Friday 26th July
If you'd like to see me at one of my surgeries, you can book an appointment by contacting my office on 01792899025 or via email at [email protected].

Constituents will receive information regarding the specific time and location of the surgery upon booking an appointment.
Privacy policy
Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of the Labour Party, 20 Rushworth Street, London SE1 0SS
